name: SofaScore Live Sports Data API
what_it_does: SofaScore live sports data REST API for sports media, apps, and analytics platforms to access real-time scores, match statistics, player ratings, team form, standings, and incident data across 20+ sports including football (soccer), basketball, tennis, American football, baseball, cricket, and esports from SofaScore's comprehensive sports data platform. Enables AI agents to manage live match score retrieval for real-time sports update automation, handle player rating data for performance analytics automation, access match incident tracking for live commentary automation, retrieve team standings for league table automation, manage player statistics for sports analytics automation, handle transfer and lineup data for fantasy sports automation, access upcoming fixtures for schedule and prediction automation, retrieve historical match data for sports trend analysis automation, manage tournament bracket for competition tracking automation, and integrate SofaScore data with sports apps, media platforms, and fantasy sports for end-to-end sports data automation.
use_cases: Displaying live match scores and incidents for sports media app automation agents
Retrieving player ratings and statistics for fantasy sports platform automation agents
Tracking team standings and form for sports analytics and prediction agents
Accessing historical match data for sports trend analysis and betting model agents
not_for: Official licensed sports data for broadcast (use Stats Perform/Opta for official licensed data)
Sports betting odds (use The Odds API or Sportradar Odds for betting markets)
Video highlight access (SofaScore is data only, not video content)
best_when: A sports app, media platform, or analytics tool wanting AI agents to access comprehensive live and historical sports data including scores, ratings, and statistics across 20+ sports through SofaScore's widely-used sports data platform.
avoid_when: API IS UNOFFICIAL/UNDOCUMENTED: SofaScore does not have an officially published public API; automated integration relies on reverse-engineered mobile app API endpoints; automated dependency on unofficial endpoints creates breaking changes risk without notice. RATE LIMITING IS AGGRESSIVE: SofaScore's unofficial API endpoints have strict rate limiting to prevent scraping; automated high-frequency polling creates IP-based throttling or blocking; automated polling must use conservative intervals. TERMS OF SERVICE RESTRICT COMMERCIAL USE: SofaScore's data is for personal use; automated commercial application using SofaScore data without licensing agreement creates ToS violation; automated commercial data pipeline requires licensing discussion with SofaScore. DATA ACCURACY FOR LOWER LEAGUES: SofaScore coverage quality varies by sport tier and region; automated assumption of complete data for all leagues creates missing or delayed stats for lower divisions.

auth.notes: SofaScore uses unofficial mobile API endpoints (no official public API). REST API with JSON. Zagreb, Croatia HQ. Founded 2010 by Slavko Kolar. Products: Live scores, player ratings, incidents, standings, statistics for 20+ sports. SDKs: None official. 150M+ users. Widely used via unofficial API. Official licensing available for commercial partners. Competes with Sportradar for sports data but primarily consumer-facing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Unofficial API access with rate limits; official commercial API via licensing discussion
pricing.paid_tiers: Commercial licensing pricing negotiated with SofaScore directly
pricing.notes: Zagreb HR. Founded 2010. Unofficial API widely used. Official commercial licensing available on request.

performance.rate_limits: Aggressive rate limiting on unofficial endpoints; no SLA on unofficial API; commercial API has defined limits

known_agent_gotchas: UNOFFICIAL API — NO STABILITY GUARANTEES: SofaScore has no official public API; automated integration uses reverse-engineered mobile endpoints that change without notice; automated production dependency on unofficial endpoints creates high breaking-change risk

COMMERCIAL USE REQUIRES LICENSING: SofaScore terms prohibit commercial use without license; automated commercial data pipeline using unofficial endpoints creates ToS violation and potential legal exposure; automated commercial use must obtain official SofaScore license

IP BLOCKING FOR HIGH VOLUME: SofaScore aggressively rate-limits and blocks IPs scraping at scale; automated high-frequency polling creates IP ban; automated production system must implement conservative polling intervals and IP rotation

ENDPOINT STRUCTURE CHANGES WITHOUT NOTICE: SofaScore mobile API endpoint paths and response schema change when app updates; automated endpoint dependency without monitoring creates silent failures when schema changes

NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING REQUIRED: SofaScore has no webhook/push mechanism; automated live score tracking requires polling; automated event-driven architecture must implement polling loop with change detection
agent_readiness.security_notes: Unofficial sports data API. GDPR. No official auth. EU. Sports and user data (commercial use requires license).

security_score_components.security_notes: Unofficial API. GDPR. No formal auth. EU. Sports match data.
